name: PandaApps
description: Native Android companion apps for Minima — eurobuddha's apps plus the official Minima app.

apps.name: Zero Edge Casino
apps.description: Provably-fair on-chain casino — coin flip, dice and roulette via a 3-phase commit-reveal contract. Zero house edge.

apps.name: Minima UTXO Wallet
apps.description: Full UTXO wallet — send & receive, split/consolidate coins, token balances and transaction history.

apps.name: Minima History
apps.description: Browse and export your node's full transaction history, with on-chain verification.

apps.name: Minima Vestr
apps.description: Token-vesting contract manager — create and track scheduled token releases on Minima.

apps.name: Minima Expert
apps.description: Offline, on-device Minima knowledge expert — ask about the protocol, TxPoW, MiniDapps and node commands, with citations.

apps.name: Minima Faucet
apps.description: Request test funds from the Minima faucet to your node's wallet address.

apps.name: Minima
apps.description: The official Minima node + wallet for Android — run a full Minima node on your phone.
